'''Nahkee''' was a [[Phlog/Legends|Phlog]] infant (or Phlogling), the son of [[Zut]] and [[Dobah]]. Nahkee was stolen by [[Morag]]. She framed the [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]] by placing Ewok hoods, bows and arrows at the scene of the abduction so that the infants parents would think that the Ewoks were responsible and seek revenge. Morag made the [[Dulok/Legends|Duloks]] take care of Nahkee while the [[Phlog/Legends|Phlog]] parents attacked the Ewoks.

{{Char-stub}}
